articles.title: Dating back to the 1600s, the second-oldest home in Cambridge lists for $5.8M
articles.description:
The property has served as the Cambridge Historical Society (now known as History Cambridge) headquarters for the last 70 years.

The post Dating back to the 1600s, the second-oldest home in Cambridge lists for $5.8M appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Cambridge's second-oldest home, dating back to the 1600s, is listed for $5.8 million.
The property has been the Cambridge Historical Society headquarters for 70 years.
Potential sale may impact local historical preservation efforts and community heritage.
